outputs.description: The full file name (including file extension). File.MD5 File MD5 hash
outputs.name: File.Name

outputs.description: The SHA1 hash of the file File.SHA256 The SHA256 hash of the file
outputs.name: File.SHA1

outputs.description: The size of the file in bytes File.Extension The extension of the file
outputs.name: File.Size

outputs.description: Description of the file type based on its magic numbers File.Path The path of the file
outputs.name: File.Type

outputs.description: Attribute to label an IoC File.ThreatTypes A list with the description of the elements in the block list
outputs.name: File.Tags

outputs.description: The DBot score DBotScore.Type The type of indicator
outputs.name: DBotScore.Score

outputs.description: The vendor used to calculate the score DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: Qualitative scoring of the maliciousness of the file. Values from 0 to 100. Maltiverse.File.Tags Attribute to label an IOC
outputs.name: Maltiverse.File.Score

outputs.description: For malicious files, the vendor that made the decision Maltiverse.File.Malicious.Description For malicious files, describes the reason for the file to be malicious
outputs.name: Maltiverse.File.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: The number of sources that positively reported the indicator as block list. Maltiverse.File.Name The file name
outputs.name: Maltiverse.File.PositiveDetections

outputs.description: Qualitative maliciousness classification for an IoC. Possible values are malicious, suspicious, neutral and whitelist Maltiverse.File.Blacklist.FirstSeen Date
outputs.name: Maltiverse.File.Classification

outputs.description: Maltiverse.File.Blacklist.LastSeen Date Last time that the IoC was seen
outputs.name: First time that the IoC has been seen.

outputs.description: Describes the reason for the URL to be in the block list Maltiverse.File.Blacklist.Source The name of sources that reported the indicator
outputs.name: Maltiverse.File.Blacklist.Description

outputs.description: Date Date when the IOC has been updated for the last time Maltiverse.File.CreationTime
outputs.name: Maltiverse.File.ModificationTime

outputs.description: Date when a IOC has been inserted for the first time Maltiverse.File.Size Size of the file in bytes
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: List of processes raised by the file in runtime. Maltiverse.File.ContactedHost List of the IP addresses contacted by the sample in runtime
outputs.name: Maltiverse.File.ProcessList

outputs.description: List of hostnames resolved by the sample in runtime
outputs.name: Maltiverse.File.DNSRequest
